## Ratings (1 = poor · 5 = excellent)

Delete the numbers that don't apply, or just bold your pick.

| # | Category | Rating |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | **Documentation & onboarding** — could you get it running and understand what it is in 5 minutes? | 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 |
| 2 | **Command quality & coverage** — are the slash-command workflows accurate, complete, and the right depth? | 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 |
| 3 | **Safety model** — placeholders, dry-run defaults, destructive gates: credible and well-executed? | 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 |
| 4 | **Real-world usefulness** — would this hold up against actual tickets in an M365/Intune/Meraki shop? | 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 |
| 5 | **Architecture & code** — CLAUDE.md-as-brain, scripts, evals, repo structure: sound engineering? | 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 |
| 6 | **Overall polish** — consistency, attention to detail, does it feel finished? | 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 |
